macro.title: Verification is the new credit score

macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage rates steady near 6.15% as oil and jobs data pose risks
macro.what: 30-year mortgage rates hovered near 6.15% as employer payrolls fell by 92,000 in February and markets expected no Fed rate cut next week.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Back on the Market: Relistings Jump as Home Sellers Bet on Stronger Spring Market
macro.what: Nearly 45,000 sellers who delisted their homes last year relisted them in January—the highest January number in records dating back a decade
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Builders gut check what buyers may like vs. what they’ll pay for
housing.what: Homebuilders lean into multifunctional rooms, storage-first kitchens, and warm palettes as generations trade size for affordability.

housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: For Real Estate Investors, the West Coast Is Hot and Florida Is Not
housing.what: Investor activity is sluggish on a national level, with purchases rising just 2%—but it varies widely from metro to metro

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: loanDepot reports $108M loss in 2025 even as volume, margins improve
notables.what: loanDepot cut its 2025 net loss to $108 million as revenue rose 12% to $1.19 billion, but margins fell to 324 bps in Q4.

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Retirement savers hold steady in 2025 as automatic enrollment drives positive trends
